backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Add Spring Boot Starter Validation to enable Bean Validation annotations in the application.
Add Spring Boot DevTools to enable automatic restarts and live reload during development.
Add Spring Boot Docker Compose support to manage containerized services during development.
Add H2 in-memory database dependency for testing or development purposes.
Add Testcontainers core library to support container-based integration testing.
Add Testcontainers MySQL module to support MySQL-specific integration tests.
Add Maven Surefire plugin with explicit version and test inclusion patterns to ensure tests run correctly.
Update JaCoCo plugin version to 0.8.12 to ensure compatibility with newer JDKs and features.
Change JaCoCo report generation phase from verify to prepare-package for earlier feedback.
Update Maven Compiler plugin to version 3.13.0 and remove explicit source/target configuration to rely on defaults.
Add Hibernate Enhance Maven plugin to enable bytecode enhancements for lazy initialization and dirty tracking.
Configure Spring Boot Maven plugin to exclude Lombok from the repackaged jar to avoid unnecessary bloat.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Changed the CI environment to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 23 to align with the target runtime.
Configured the Maven build step to skip test execution to speed up the pipeline or avoid test failures.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add pattern to ignore editor backup files ending with tilde.

backend/compose.yaml.general_idea: Pinned the MySQL Docker image to a specific version (8.3.0) instead of using 'latest' for reproducibility.
Added an explicit container name for easier identification and management.
Replaced hardcoded database credentials with environment variable references to improve security.
Corrected the port mapping syntax to explicitly map the host port to the container port.
Configured MySQL to use the native password authentication plugin, often required for compatibility with older clients or specific drivers.
Added a health check to monitor the MySQL service status for orchestration purposes.
Defined and attached a custom bridge network for the service to isolate traffic.

backend/src/main/resources/application.p.general_idea: Disable the Spring Boot startup banner to reduce console noise.
Enable automatic Hibernate schema update on startup.
Remove commented-out OAuth2 client configuration for Google.
Remove commented-out TMDB access token configuration.
Specify the MySQL JDBC driver class for the datasource.
Configure database username and password using environment variables.
Configure the database connection URL using an environment variable.
Enable logging of executed SQL statements for debugging.
